run_manifest.scenario_profile_note: traffic_v0 is paired with medical_v0.1: a thin traffic scenario exercises trace/bundle/review mechanics with a minimal SaMD-style pack; it does not assert standards alignment between traffic control and medical device software content.

C2.evidence: Mechanical checks and review scripts succeed across robustness matrix.

C3.evidence: Worked examples extend to real-world proxy scenarios (warehouse/traffic).
